## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX teams to discuss content performance, strategy, and workflow optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/N42k6-sDUmzAwZQ9o15-9dTL8ox3mWwj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog page clicks declined; CTR dropped due to increased impressions](https://fathom.video/share/N42k6-sDUmzAwZQ9o15-9dTL8ox3mWwj?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Per diem pages stable; new baseline established post-peak performance](https://fathom.video/share/N42k6-sDUmzAwZQ9o15-9dTL8ox3mWwj?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Treasury pages tracking initiated; some title/intent mismatches identified](https://fathom.video/share/N42k6-sDUmzAwZQ9o15-9dTL8ox3mWwj?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [New vendor page batch scheduled; workflow feedback requested](https://fathom.video/share/N42k6-sDUmzAwZQ9o15-9dTL8ox3mWwj?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Sanity CMS structure updates proposed for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/N42k6-sDUmzAwZQ9o15-9dTL8ox3mWwj?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)

## Topics

### Blog Performance Analysis

  - [Clicks declined over past 3 weeks; CTR dropped due to increased impressions](https://fathom.video/share/N42k6-sDUmzAwZQ9o15-9dTL8ox3mWwj?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Identified pages needing refresh based on CTR drops and impression loss](https://fathom.video/share/N42k6-sDUmzAwZQ9o15-9dTL8ox3mWwj?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Matt to de-dupe refresh list against internal non-productive URLs](https://fathom.video/share/N42k6-sDUmzAwZQ9o15-9dTL8ox3mWwj?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Victoria applied redirects to 2 pages; most others in tuning pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/N42k6-sDUmzAwZQ9o15-9dTL8ox3mWwj?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
